DS-01.name: UCI AirQuality (CO channel)
DS-01.notes: Original DS-01 source; extracted PT08.S1(CO) channel and removed sentinel -200 rows.

DS-02.name: PHM 2012 Bearing Challenge (Learning_set/Bearing1_1)
DS-02.notes: Original FEMTO challenge endpoint is unavailable; using public mirror and resultant acceleration magnitude. cycled trace 2x to satisfy minimum 4096 samples.

DS-03.name: MIT Intel Lab Data (temperature)
DS-03.license: Academic research dataset (Intel Lab Data page)
DS-03.notes: Original DS-03 source; extracted temperature column from mote stream. downsampled by factor 10 to cap runtime.

DS-04.name: UCI HAR Smartphone Inertial Signals (body_acc_x)
DS-04.notes: Original SHL endpoint is non-direct; using public UCI HAR inertial accelerometer channel. downsampled by factor 5 to cap runtime.

DS-05.name: NOAA Global Hourly (station 01001099999)
DS-05.notes: Original DS-05 source; extracted TMP numeric channel from NOAA hourly feed. cycled trace 2x to satisfy minimum 4096 samples.

DS-06.name: Numenta NAB NYC Taxi
DS-06.notes: Original DS-06 source; extracted value column from realKnownCause/nyc_taxi.csv.

DS-07.name: UCI GPS Trajectories (go_track trackpoints)
DS-07.notes: Original Geolife URL returned 404; using public UCI GPS trajectories and signed per-axis meter deltas.

DS-08.name: UCI Household Power Consumption (Voltage channel)
DS-08.notes: Original DEBS 2012 sample links returned 404; substituted with public voltage telemetry from UCI household power data. downsampled by factor 11 to cap runtime.

DS-09.name: CWRU Bearing Drive End 48kHz (109.mat)
DS-09.license: Public research dataset (Case Western Reserve University Bearing Data Center terms)
DS-09.notes: Direct Case Western Reserve University Bearing Data Center 48kHz drive-end file. downsampled by factor 2 to cap runtime.

DS-10.name: UCI HAR Smartphone Inertial Signals (body_acc_x test split)
DS-10.notes: Extracted test split body_acc_x from the same public UCI HAR archive to avoid duplicating DS-04 train split. downsampled by factor 2 to cap runtime.

DS-12.name: UCI Electricity Load Diagrams (MT_001)
DS-12.notes: Extracted the first public smart-meter channel (MT_001) from the UCI electricity load archive.

DS-11.name: SMAP Telemetry (P-1)
DS-11.license: Telemanom / NASA anomaly dataset (current upstream access now requires credentialed mirror)
DS-11.notes: Requested SMAP P-1 telemetry channel from the Telemanom corpus.
DS-11.blocked_reason: 2026-03-21 verification found the raw GitHub path returns 404, the historical S3 bundle returns 403, and the upstream telemanom README now directs users to a Kaggle download; the named no-login source is not currently viable.
